name: HWR_WLNS_USR_SUM
description: The wellness user summary table stores user metrics by summary date.

columns.Name: USER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the user wellness table.

columns.Name: SUMMARY_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the date of the wellness user data summary.

columns.Name: STEPS
columns.Comments: This is the total number of steps for the date.

columns.Name: CALORIES
columns.Comments: This is the total number of calories for the date.

columns.Name: DISTANCE
columns.Comments: This is the total distance for the date.

columns.Name: FAIRLY_ACTIVE_TIME
columns.Comments: This is the total fairly active time for the date.

columns.Name: VERY_ACTIVE_TIME
columns.Comments: This is the total very active time for the date.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_SCORE
columns.Comments: This is the total active score for the date.

columns.Name: IS_SEDENTARY
columns.Comments: This is the sedentary flag for the date.

columns.Name: PROJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the project type for the date.

columns.Name: PERFORMANCE
columns.Comments: This is the performance score for the date.

columns.Name: STRESS_SCORE
columns.Comments: This is the stress score for the date.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the source id of the wellness user data summary.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
